query: Guru G Barber Shop Westville barber

kept.title: Guru G Barber Shop - Shop 6B Westville Junction, Westville R
kept.reason: Title matches this shop's exact address (Shop 6B Westville Junction). Depicts a modest, candid two-chair barbershop interior consistent in scale with a small mall unit — plant, round mirrors, product shelf, tile floor. No competing branding or logos visible.

rejected.reason: Manifest title says 'Dischem Entrance, Westwood Mall' — a different Guru G location, not Shop 6B Westville Junction. Image is also a highly stylized amber-lit render inconsistent with the shop's real scale.
Manifest title says '141 Inanda Rd, Waterfall' — a different location. Image depicts a women's hair/beauty salon (model poster, colorful retail wall, red tile floor), not a barbershop at all.

Title nominally matches the Westville Junction address, but the image is a polished, professionally-lit posed portrait with no shop-identifying features, stylistically inconsistent with the confirmed candid real_01 photo. High mis-attribution risk from Fresha scraping; rejected per 'when uncertain, reject'.
Manifest title says 'Dischem Entrance, Westwood Mall' — a different location. Image is a staged portrait in an industrial exposed-brick setting inconsistent with the shop.

Manifest title says 'Hillcrest Corner - Shop 01A, Upper Floor' — a different location. Image shows a large multi-chair venue with stage lighting and a staircase, inconsistent with a small 'Shop 6B' mall unit.

note: Vetted per SOP 2026-07-12. Only 1 of 6 scout photos plausibly belongs to this Westville Junction shop; the other 5 titles resolve to three different Guru G branch locations (Westwood Mall, Waterfall, Hillcrest) or a mismatched venue type. Stock fill used to reach a full gallery.
